response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in geospatial data (GISCollective) and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby), but his experience is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, TypeScript, and Node.js rather than the required C++/Rust focus for routing tiling. His geospatial work is relevant but lacks direct experience with routing pipelines or navigation systems.
strengths: Strong geospatial data processing experience (GISCollective platform)
Proven ability to build low-latency systems (Dunnhumby, DLang)
Hands-on with distributed systems and DevOps (Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited C++/Rust experience (primary requirement for this role)
No direct experience with routing data pipelines or navigation systems
Most recent experience is in web/backend development (TypeScript/Node.js) rather than systems programming
